title: Goat Horn Note Blocks
description:
Play Goat Horns using Note Blocks.
Finally a Doorbell you can hear.
body:
## How to use:
- Place a Note Block.
- Place a Item Frame onto the Note Block. All sides and orientation are okay.
- Place the selected Goat Horn into the Item Frame.
- A particle Effect will play. This can take up to 10 seconds.
- Powering the Note Block will trigger the Goat Horn.
- Optionally you want to cover the top of the Note Block to surpress the default sound.

## Known Issues:
- None

## Fancy Text:
Unlock a world of endless creativity with the 'Goat Horn Note Block' datapack for Minecraft! Say goodbye to the limitations of traditional goat horns and embrace a new era of musical expression.

Embark on your musical journey, place a item frame on the note block and insert the goat horn into it to unleash its full potential!

With this innovative datapack, the possibilities are truly endless. Beyond just musical compositions, imagine using the goat horn as a doorbell that you won't overhear. Set up your note block contraption outside your base or castle, and whenever someone approaches, they'll be greeted with the charming sound of the goat horn, alerting you without disturbing the tranquility of your surroundings.

But that's just scratching the surface of what you can achieve. Create intricate redstone contraptions that trigger goat horn melodies in response to specific events or player actions. Use them to signal the opening of secret passages, the activation of traps, or even as part of elaborate puzzle mechanisms.

And let's not forget about the role-playing possibilities. Whether you're building a bustling marketplace, a tranquil village, or a majestic castle, the addition of goat horn note blocks can add depth and immersion to your Minecraft world, enriching the atmosphere and bringing your creations to life in ways you never thought possible.
